title: Email Sender API
statement: Implement a simple email sender API using the Nodemailer library. The API should have two endpoints: `POST /api/send-email` to send an email and `GET /api/test-email` to verify the email functionality without sending a real email. The email should be sent from a fixed sender address to a fixed recipient address. The payload for the `POST /api/send-email` endpoint should contain the email subject and body. The API should handle errors and return a success or failure response.
constraints: Must use the Nodemailer library for sending emails
Must use the Express framework for implementing the API

endpoints.description: Sends an email with the specified subject and body. The API expects a JSON payload with the following structure: `{"subject": "Email Subject", "body": "Email Body"}`
Verifies the email functionality without sending a real email. Returns a success response if the API is configured correctly
